---
title: "Consumer Theory"
---

This section develops standard consumer theory in two pieces: per-utility-family modules covering utility maximisation, and a separate Duality module collecting expenditure minimisation, Hicksian demand, and Slutsky decomposition uniformly across families.

## Utility maximisation (per utility family)

- [Perfect Substitutes](perfect-substitutes.qmd)
- [Cobb–Douglas](cobb-douglas.qmd)
- *Perfect Complements* (coming soon)

## Duality (cross-family)

- *Expenditure minimisation, Hicksian demand, Slutsky decomposition* (coming soon)
